steps.title: Undo the outside multiplication
steps.content: The original equation is $$7(2x-3)=63.$$ Divide both sides by $7$ to keep the same solution while simplifying the equation.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The equation $2x-3=9$ is equivalent to the original equation. Dividing incorrectly or distributing only part of the $7$ changes the solution; correct distribution would give $14x-21=63$. A is correct.
